steps.title: Read a clear point off the graph
steps.content: The line crosses the $y$-axis at the point $(0,2)$, an easy lattice point to read.

steps.title: Substitute and solve for B
steps.content: Plug $(0,2)$ into $10x+By=50$: $$10(0)+B(2)=50 \Rightarrow 2B=50 \Rightarrow B=25.$$ That matches choice A — A is correct.
